title: Bogla Mama Jug Jug Jio
desc: Meet a middle-aged theater enthusiast adored by his town for his knack for solving problems. His passion for the arts and clever solutions make him a local hero!

title: Alo
desc: An educated woman brings positive changes by enlightening the poverty-stricken villagers.

title: Awsoriri
desc: Jagannathan, a food safety officer, earns enemies after closing outlets that sell adulterated food. When he dies, he possesses his lover, Jyothi, who is anosmic, to avenge those who murdered him.

title: Kacher Manush
desc: Two men discuss their life's upheavals and devise unconventional solutions.

title: Herogiri
desc: Shuvo is content being single. When his friend tells him about a girl and her father who are cheating naive men, he decides to teach them a lesson.

title: Shororipu 2: Jotugriho
desc: A mysterious death forces a cop to spring into action and uncover dark secrets.

title: Ardhangini
desc: Shubhra and Meghna face emotional turmoil when Suman suffers an accident.

title: Golmaal
desc: Four goofy friends create endless confusion with their crazy plans, turning every situation into laughter and chaos.

title: Asookh
desc: Sudhamoy is forced to depend on his daughter's money when his wife falls critically ill.

title: Rangbaaz
desc: Madhurima falls in love with Raj when they get stranded on an island. But Raj is uninterested, as he is on a mission to avenge his father's death.

title: Tumi Ashbe Bole
desc: Despite falling in love with Aankhi, Nanda fails to turn up on their wedding day.

title: Bagh Bandi Khela
desc: Vabesh wants to stand for election and to reduce his declarable wealth he gifts his money to his son.

title: Bony
desc: A couple living in Milan, Italy, have a child who has some special powers.

title: Manasha Kanya
desc: Basi and Suman fall in love but the latter's father disapproves of their relationship.

title: Kanchana
desc: Raghava, a man who is scared of going outside, tries to conquer his fears by going to a ground that is supposedly haunted. However, he is soon possessed by a spirit who is out for revenge.

title: Bluff Master
desc: Bluff Master delivers comedic misadventures, clever schemes, and surprising revelations, keeping viewers entertained with humor and wit.

title: Sentimentaal
desc: Suryaa Roy, a police officer, deals with Rudrani Chowdhury who runs illicit trades.

title: Maayakumari
desc: A director sets out to make a biopic on a famed actress and explores her disappearance.

title: Mr. Majnu
desc: A charming flirt who has never been in a serious relationship with anyone finds himself in unfamiliar territory when he falls in love with a woman.

title: Golmaal
desc: Love connections are crossed in the complicated lives of three young orphans.

title: Honeymoon
desc: Couple's honeymoon turns emotional with family joining for land deal.

title: One
desc: An aspiring policeman conducts an informal investigation against a devious scientist.

title: Guru
desc: Best friends Raja and Iqbal, who hail from different religious backgrounds, help the local people. Their friendship is at stake when Raja's brother falls in love with Iqbal's fiancee.

title: Action
desc: Raka always gets what she desires, until she is rejected by Akash, a fellow student.

title: Golmaal Again
desc: Five orphan men return to their orphanage only to encounter the ghost of a friend.

title: Kelor Kirti
desc: Chaos ensues in the lives of three young couples after they come across a charming lady.

title: Chaya O Chobi
desc: Chaos ensues when an actress mysteriously disappears from an ongoing shooting of her film.

title: Ki Kore Toke Bolbo
desc: On their wedding night, Anjali tells her husband, Akash, that she wants to divorce him. However, months later, she falls in love with Akash.

title: Chaamp
desc: Shibaji, a famous Indian boxer, tries to revive his career after a tragic accident.

title: Loveria
desc: Car mechanich Aditya falls in love with Sweety, a rich, spoilt brat.Although they want to get married but her father opposes the relationship.

title: Tirandaj Shabor
desc: The arrival of a dead cab passenger at a police station triggers a murder investigation.

title: Rx 100
desc: Shiva falls for Indu, a politician's daughter. Their love burns bright, but separation turns him violent and unpredictable, shaking everything around him.

title: Paglu
desc: A romantic saga unfolds as a wealthy girl falls for a poor boy, but parental objection threatens their love.

title: Walter
desc: Walter, a small-town policeman, is approached by a couple whose newborn baby has disappeared. As his investigation deepens, Walter uncovers a much larger conspiracy.

title: Kuler Achaar
desc: Mithi, a young woman refuses to change her surname after marriage but it doesn't sit well with her orthodox in-laws and the patriarchal society. All hell breaks loose when her mother-in-law supports her and decides to follow suit.

title: Voice Of The Nation
desc: Experts and journalists debate major national issues while presenting strong opinions and diverse viewpoints.

title: Aloukik
desc: A group of tantric practitioners announce that they have a small girl in their possession who has a superpower. Meanwhile, a team of rational people investigate the revelations.
